mitre_techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
mitre_techniques.justification: Command and Scripting Interpreter (Execution) — Adversary abuses command-line or scripting interpreters to execute malicious code. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_techniques.name: Valid Accounts
mitre_techniques.justification: Valid Accounts (Initial Access) — Use of compromised legitimate credentials to gain initial or persistent access. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_techniques.name: Exploitation of Remote Services
mitre_techniques.justification: Exploitation of Remote Services (Lateral Movement) — Exploitation of vulnerabilities in remote services to move laterally within the network. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.
